summary: A CLA under which an individual contributor grants the Open Beacon Foundation a perpetual, royalty-free copyright and patent license to their contributions, provided as-is with no warranties.

parties.name: Open Beacon Foundation
parties.evidence_quote: the Open Beacon Foundation, a Delaware nonprofit corporation

parties.name: Contributor
parties.evidence_quote: the individual identified in the signature block below ("You" or "Contributor")

key_details.label: Effective date
key_details.evidence_quote: effective as of the date signed by You below (the "Effective Date")

key_details.label: Term
key_details.value: Perpetual; the licenses granted are irrevocable
key_details.evidence_quote: This Agreement is perpetual and the licenses granted herein are irrevocable

key_details.label: Contribution
key_details.value: Any original work of authorship the Contributor intentionally submits to the Foundation
key_details.evidence_quote: any original work of authorship, including any modifications or additions to an existing work, that You intentionally submit to the Foundation

key_details.label: License grant
key_details.value: Perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to the Foundation and downstream recipients
key_details.evidence_quote: You hereby grant to the Foundation and to recipients of software distributed by the Foundation a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license

key_details.label: Governing law
key_details.evidence_quote: laws of the State of Delaware, excluding its conflict of laws principles

key_details.label: Warranty
key_details.value: Contributions provided AS IS, without warranties of title, non-infringement, merchantability, or fitness
key_details.evidence_quote: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied, including, without limitation, any warranties or conditions of TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, MERCHANTABILITY, or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE
